purpose: Prove governance state can be reconstructed from event logs, lineage objects, and spine references — that governance survives sessions and operators.

reconstruction_tests.description: Reconstruct CEU candidate count from derivation lineage
Reconstruct merge decisions from derivation lineage
Reconstruct S-state from promotion event log
reconstruction_tests.method: Replay EVT-001: S0 → S1 via structural_onboarding_complete

reconstruction_tests.description: Reconstruct reconciliation status from event log
reconstruction_tests.method: Replay RCEU-0001 through RCEU-0035. Count terminal states.

reconstruction_tests.description: Reconstruct obligation resolution from event log
reconstruction_tests.method: Replay OBL-CEU-0001 through OBL-CEU-0003 from events RCEU-0031 to RCEU-0033

reconstruction_tests.description: Reconstruct Phase 7 evidence ingestion from event log
reconstruction_tests.method: Replay RCEU-0036 through RCEU-0041. Count new evidence attachments.
reconstruction_tests.actual: RCEU-0037: 3 to CEU-EXTRAS, RCEU-0038: 2 to CEU-TENANCY, RCEU-0039: 1 to CEU-DCIM, RCEU-0040: 1 to CEU-UTILITIES, RCEU-0041: 1 to CEU-NETBOX = 8 total

reconstruction_tests.description: Reconstruct CEU-EXTRAS reclassification from event log
reconstruction_tests.actual: RCEU-0042: CONFIRMED→REOPENED, RCEU-0043: REOPENED→RECLASSIFIED (CONSUMER→FOUNDATION), RCEU-0044: RECLASSIFIED→CONFIRMED

reconstruction_tests.description: Reconstruct CEU-TENANCY refinement from event log

reconstruction_tests.method: Check RCEU-0001 through RCEU-0046 for gaps
Trace evidence_object lineage from intake through 40.2 → 40.2r → 40.3r → 40.3s → 40.3c
reconstruction_tests.expected: Lineage chain from root to centrality derivation

reconstruction_tests.description: Verify governance state matches event log terminal state
reconstruction_tests.method: Compare reconciliation_state.json against replayed event log terminal state
reconstruction_tests.actual: reconciliation_state shows: 12 CONFIRMED, 1 MERGED, 1 reclassified (EXTRAS), 1 refined (TENANCY). Matches events RCEU-0001 through RCEU-0046.

reconstruction_tests.method: Check replay corridor input_hash and output_hashes against actual artifacts
reconstruction_tests.expected: All output hashes match stored values
reconstruction_tests.actual: Replay corridor 9a624e6b contains 8 output hash entries. Artifact hashes verified against baseline_freeze hash values.

reconstruction_summary.conclusion: Governance state is fully reconstructable from event logs, derivation lineage, and spine objects. The Phase 7 evidence ingestion cycle (RCEU-0036 through RCEU-0046) is replayable. The CEU-EXTRAS reclassification lifecycle (reopen → reclassify → re-confirm) is fully traceable. No state requires Claude-session memory to reconstruct.

remaining_session_dependencies: Evidence ingestion selection (which docs to ingest) required human judgment — not persistent workflow
CEU challenge identification required structural analysis — partially derivable from evidence delta artifact
Reclassification decision required operator authority — event log records decision but not reasoning process
